rationale.oversight-scaling-inversion: Synthesizes AI-code productivity/adoption vs 40-50% vulnerability, quality gaps needing sustained review
rationale.lit-review: Secondary synthesis of IEEE/ACM/industry studies; evidence synthesized, not produced
rationale.risk-security: Focal secondhand synthesis of AI-code vulnerability rates (Stanford/Georgetown/Veracode)
rationale.risk-quality: Focal secondhand synthesis of correctness degradation, technical-debt, debugging overhead
rationale.assistive: Evidence predominantly on human-initiated completion tools (Copilot acceptance-moment)
